byOptionId.tellwhatversion: Correct â€” DOCTYPE tells the browser to use the standard HTML parsing mode.
byOptionId.displaytitle: Incorrect â€” DOCTYPE does not display titles.
byOptionId.csslink: Incorrect â€” CSS is linked with <link>, not DOCTYPE.
byOptionId.definebody: Incorrect â€” DOCTYPE does not define the body element.

byOptionId.body: Correct â€” visible content goes inside <body>.
byOptionId.head: Incorrect â€” <head> holds metadata and resources, not the main visible content.
byOptionId.html: Incorrect â€” <html> is the root wrapper, not the visible content container.
byOptionId.meta: Incorrect â€” <meta> provides metadata such as charset or viewport info.

questions.prompt: Wo formvollendet glatt kess weich lüstern wüst krass formschön The the dröhnend The The the von fetten wüsten strammen <title> tag rein formschön?

options.label: Fett weit wüst draußen vor sattem <html>

explanations.overview: <title> belongs in the head and appears in the browser tab.

byOptionId.head: Correct â€” <title> is placed in <head> and is shown in the browser tab.
byOptionId.body: Incorrect â€” <title> should not be inside <body>.
byOptionId.footer: Incorrect â€” <footer> is part of the page body, not where <title> belongs.
byOptionId.outside: Incorrect â€” <title> must be inside <head> within <html>.

questions.prompt: Was Their The Their Their To

explanations.overview: <html> is the outer element that wraps the whole document.

byOptionId.html: Correct â€” <html> is the document root.
byOptionId.head: Incorrect â€” <head> is a child of <html>.
byOptionId.body: Incorrect â€” <body> is also a child of <html>, not the root.
byOptionId.doctype: Incorrect â€” DOCTYPE is a declaration, not the root element.
